name: End-Effector Depth Scanning & 3D Reconstruction
description: As a robotics engineer simulating a 3D optical inspection process in CoppeliaSim (ZMQ Remote API port 23000), spawn a primitive shape at world coordinates (0.5, 0.0, 0.1). Attach a vision sensor with depth rendering to the robot arm's end-effector and capture depth buffers from at least 4 distinct joint configurations pointing at the target. Save raw normalized depth values to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/depth_view_<id>.csv. Back-project the depth pixels into 3D world coordinates, filtering background points (depth == 1.0), and save the aggregated 3D points to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/merged_pointcloud.csv with columns: view_id, px, py, world_x, world_y, world_z. Save a metadata report including sensor configurations, resolution, clipping planes, and pose matrices to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/scanning_report.json. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
